overview: StrataFi is a multi-tenant CRM for insurance agencies with AI voice calling, a drag-and-drop lead pipeline, and CSV bulk lead import.
features: AI voice provider integration with live outbound calls
Drag-and-drop kanban pipeline board for lead management
CSV import for bulk lead uploads with validation preview
Lead detail editing with interaction timeline
Multi-tenant backend with tenant switching and onboarding
Dark-mode StrataFi design system with green and blue accents
Mock data seeded so all pages load populated
